name_cn:
MCM Aren Visetos
New mini patchwork basket 👜
Exclusive® Classic Cognac
This mini Aren top-zip shopper is the latest design for Spring/Summer 2024, featuring eye-catching Spanish calfskin trim outlining the upper part of the bag. This small daily bag is lined with soft eco-friendly cotton, offering ample space for small essentials and valuables. A soft leather handle provides a comfortable hand-carry experience, while the included leather crossbody strap allows for an elegant hands-free function.
Model: MWPDSTA01CO001
Size: 21.5*9.5*19cm
Strap: 100-116cm
Handle: Drop 11cm
Color: Cognac/Brown🏾
